steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The blank is part of a participial phrase (“making ______ the first time the organization would appoint a Vietnamese leader”) that modifies the main clause. It comes after the verb “making”.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree in number with its antecedent—the singular appointment event requires singular “this”. The plural “these” and “those” violate number agreement; “some” is indefinite and lacks a clear reference. That is the correct answer.
